notable_prs.title: Build notification service with queue-based delivery
notable_prs.description: New notification service with queue-based delivery, user preferences, and retry logic with exponential backoff.
quality_signals: this is not typical junior work

notable_prs.title: Add email verification flow
notable_prs.description: Implements email verification flow with token generation and expiry.

review_quality_samples.comment: I tested this on the notification preferences page and the contrast ratio on the muted text drops below WCAG AA. Here's a fix: change `text-gray-500` to `text-gray-400` on line 47. Screenshot attached.
review_quality_samples.quality: high — caught accessibility issue, tested it, provided fix

kpis.sprint_velocity: avg 9 points/sprint (was 5 at start of quarter — 80% improvement)

anthropic_usage.quality_note: Highest AI adoption on the team. Uses Claude to accelerate learning — asks it to explain senior engineers' code, generates tests to understand edge cases, uses it to prep for code reviews. This is the ideal junior engineer AI usage pattern.
